response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Software Engineer across multiple domains, with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React skills. However, his background leans heavily toward startups and open-source projects rather than enterprise systems or renewable energy/construction technology. His lack of direct experience with PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services (except CDK) may require additional learning, though his adaptability is evident.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development expertise
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks (Node.js, React, Dlang, etc.)
Experience with scalable systems and automation tools
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js
No explicit mention of clean architecture or enterprise-level systems
Recent roles focus on AI/ML and automation rather than renewable energy platforms
